creator: tobias.rehbein@web.de
text:
Update www/nanoblogger and www/nanobloger-extra to the latest version (3.4.2).  This PR contains patches for both ports as they need to be in sync.

        From the project site: This release addresses additional issues found with Bash 4 and fixes some logic in the handling of user plugins.

Fix: Removed files:
        www/nanoblogger/files/patch-plugins__archive__master_index.sh
        www/nanoblogger/files/patch-plugins__archive__year__year_archive.sh
        www/nanoblogger/files/patch-plugins__page__feed_links.sh
